meta.title: Gastown Working Corridor (deterministic fallback)
meta.source: deterministic fallback with optional open reference inputs
buildNotes: Working fallback corridor is active because required offline civic source files are missing.
This world is intentionally human-scaled and deterministic for readability, but now stages the playable route as the primary Gastown build rather than a throwaway starter.
No refreshed reference inputs were present; deterministic default route staging was used.

route.name: Waterfront Station → Water Street → Steam Clock working corridor

buildings.style_notes: Stylized Gastown heritage storefront cadence tuned for darker road surfacing, clearer sidewalks, and stronger Water Street identity.

landmarks.label: Waterfront Station threshold
landmarks.cue: Station canopies give way to brick-front Gastown blocks and the Water Street bend begins.

landmarks.label: Water Street gateway
landmarks.cue: The route tightens into the Water Street heritage frontage with a more legible Gastown bend.

landmarks.label: Gastown Steam Clock
landmarks.cue: A small brick-paved plaza opens on the heritage sidewalk and reveals the Steam Clock on the proper approach side.

landmarks.label: Maple Tree Square edge
landmarks.cue: The street opens slightly after the clock with a plaza-like pause before the corridor continues.

landmarks.label: Cambie rise continuation
landmarks.cue: The corridor loosens into longer facades and a quieter continuation east toward the Cambie rise.

bounds.edgeMessage: Stayed within the Gastown working corridor.
bounds.resetMessage: Returned to the Gastown working corridor.
